question:
Why is cheating on a standardized test generally considered wrong?
A) It invalidates the purpose of the assessment and unfairly disadvantages honest test-takers.
B) It makes the test too easy for the teachers to grade.
C) It causes the physical test paper to degrade.
D) It means the student will literally forget everything they learned.
